emails.subject: EPMI-EES Discrepancies (3/29)
emails.body: EPMI-EES Discrepancies (3/29) Okay! Real Time has finally drilled down on the problem we were having with deal 564094 (STCA buys from EES/HE 9-22 $160) and corrected the Real Time sheet to reflect our price. I apologize for the delay in finding the source of the problem, and as it turns out it was just a matter of someone putting the wrong price in the sheet they sent you. Very frustrating, I know, but I've attached the correct sheet nonetheless. Please call or e-mail with questions, and I'm sure I'll hear from you soon! Thanks, Kate Symes Trading Support 503-464-7486
